titleStmt.title: SII 26.362: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 362. (A.R. No. 341 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the beginning, and hence several important details are not available.

It records a gift of 10 paṇam of money for burning a sandhi lamp in the temple of Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyanāyaṉār in Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by a certain araiyaṉ (full name not preserved) of Śivapuram in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in the same maṇḍalam. The gift was accepted by the same Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who figure in No. 358 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Immaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattuc civapurattu
paraiyaṉ pakkal Ikkoyilil civappirāmaṇaril gautamaṉ Aracapaṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ tāḻipaṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum kācivaṉ poṟkoyil nampi comaṉātevapaṭṭaṉum Iv
kaikkoṇṭa paṇam pattu Ippaṇam pattukkum Orucanti viḷakku cantirātittavarai Erippatāka poliyūṭṭākak kaikkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ivai ceṉṉel peṟṟāṉ Aracapaṭṭasya Ivai poṉṉampalakkūttaṉ tāḻi bhaṭṭasya
Ivai Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭasya Ivai comaṉātatevabhaṭṭasya §
Digital edition of SII 26.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
